summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRMaster Supabase PostgreSQL migration. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all pages load correctly: Dashboard, Müşteriler, Kanban, Ziyaretler, Filtreler. Fixed route ordering bug in /api/options/grouped endpoint.

minor.issue: Route was being matched by /api/options/{field_name} due to incorrect route ordering - FIXED

issues: Chart.js 'Filler' plugin warning - minor, doesn't affect functionality
Options loading error was caused by backend route issue - now fixed

passed_tests: ✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads with session (stats, charts, recent customers)
✅ Frontend: Müşteriler page - 9 customers displayed in table
✅ Frontend: Kanban page - 6 columns, 9 cards, group-by dropdown
✅ Frontend: Filtreler page - empty state with create button
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fixed: /api/options/grouped must be defined before /api/options/{field_name} to avoid parameter matching conflict
Chart.js Filler plugin warning in console - consider importing and registering the plugin if fill option is needed
seed_data_creation: Created test customers, visits, calls, filters during pytest execution (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase PostgreSQL migration complete and verified. All CRUD operations working: customers, visits, calls, filters, kanban views. Auth working with local registration/login. Session-based authentication using cookies. Fixed /api/options/grouped route ordering issue. Database has 9 test customers, 2 visits. Frontend uses Emergent Google Auth for production but supports local auth for testing.
